2606.04915.title: Caliper: Probing Lexical Anchors versus Causal Structure in LLMs
2606.04915.paper_summary: Large language models reach 50 to 70% accuracy on causal reasoning benchmarks such as CLadder, but it is unclear whether this reflects structural reasoning or lexical pattern matching. We introduce Caliper, a controlled perturbation that replaces semantic variable names with placeholder tokens while preserving the causal graph and probabilistic specification of each question. Across nine instruction-tuned LLMs from 3.8B to 671B and three causal reasoning benchmarks, lexical anonymization yields robust accuracy drops of +7.6, +27.0, and +11.1 pp on a local 3.8B-14B set, rising to +29.6 and +18.0 pp on CRASS and e-CARE across nine frontier models spanning the 2024-2026 generations. Of 40 engaged model-by-benchmark cells, 39 show a positive gap, and the gap collapses by 17x on CLadder's pseudoword subset. Structured scaffolding and few-shot in-context learning each narrow the gap, but mainly by lowering P0 accuracy on smaller models rather than recovering P1. Current instruction-tuned LLMs, evaluated zero-shot, show little evidence of structural causal reasoning once lexical anchors are removed.
2606.04915.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型在因果推理基準如 CLadder 上達到 50% 到 70% 的準確率，但尚不清楚這是否反映了結構推理或詞彙模式匹配。我們引入了 Caliper，一種控制擾動，將語義變量名稱替換為佔位符標記，同時保留每個問題的因果圖和概率規範。在九個經過指令調整的 LLM 中，從 3.8B 到 671B，以及三個因果推理基準中，詞彙匿名化在本地 3.8B-14B 集合上產生了 +7.6、+27.0 和 +11.1 個百分點的穩健準確率下降，在 CRASS 和 e-CARE 上則上升至 +29.6 和 +18.0 個百分點，涵蓋了九個跨越 2024-2026 年代的前沿模型。在 40 個參與的模型與基準單元中，39 個顯示出正向差距，而在 CLadder 的假詞子集上，該差距縮小了 17 倍。結構搭架和少量上下文學習各自縮小了差距，但主要是通過降低較小模型的 P0 準確率，而不是恢復 P1。目前的指令調整 LLM 在零-shot 評估中，當移除詞彙錨點後，幾乎沒有顯示出結構因果推理的證據。
2606.04915.author: Zhenyu Yu et.al.
